routes.documentation: Retrieve the available funds stored on your Stripe balance
Retrieve a list of ten Stripe transactions

responses.body:
{
  "object": "list",
  "url": "/v1/balance_transactions",
  "has_more": {{oneOf (array true false)}},
  "data": [
    {{#repeat 10}}

  {
    "id": "{{faker 'random.alpha' count = 3}}_{{faker 'random.alphaNumeric' 25}}",
    "object": "balance_transaction",
    "amount": {{faker 'random.number' min = -999999 max = 999999}},
    "available_on": {{faker 'random.number' max = 2147483647}},
    "created": {{faker 'random.number' max = 2147483647}},
    "currency": "{{oneOf (array 'nzd' 'czk' 'aud' 'usd' 'eur' 'cad' 'gbp' 'jpy' 'brl' 'sek')}}",
    "description": "{{oneOf (array 'adjustement' 'advance' 'advance_funding' 'anticipation_repayment' 'application_fee' 'application_fee_refund' 'charge' 'connect_collection_transfer' 'contribution' 'issuing_authorization_hold' 'issuing_authorization_release' 'issuing_dispute' 'issuing_transaction' 'payment_failure_refund' 'payment' 'payment_refund' 'payout' 'payout_cancel' 'payout_failure' 'refund' 'refund_failure' 'reserve_transaction' 'reserved_funds' 'stripe_fee' 'stripe_fx_fee' 'tax_fee' 'topup' 'topup_reversal' 'transfer' 'transfer_cancel' 'transfer_failure' 'transfer_refund')}} for {{faker 'internet.email'}}",
    "exchange_rate": null,
    "fee": {{faker 'random.number' min = -999 max = 999}},
    "fee_details": [
      {
        "amount": {{faker 'random.number' min = -999 max = 999}},
        "application": null,
        "currency": "{{oneOf (array 'nzd' 'czk' 'aud' 'usd' 'eur' 'cad' 'gbp' 'jpy' 'brl' 'sek')}}",
        "description": "{{oneOf (array 'Stripe processing fees' 'Application processing fee' 'Tax fee')}}",
        "type": "{{oneOf (array 'application_fee' 'stripe_fee' 'tax')}}"
      }
    ],
    "net": {{faker 'random.number' min = -999999 max = 999999}},
    "reporting_category": "{{oneOf (array 'adjustement' 'advance' 'advance_funding' 'anticipation_repayment' 'application_fee' 'application_fee_refund' 'charge' 'connect_collection_transfer' 'contribution' 'issuing_authorization_hold' 'issuing_authorization_release' 'issuing_dispute' 'issuing_transaction' 'payment_failure_refund' 'payment' 'payment_refund' 'payout' 'payout_cancel' 'payout_failure' 'refund' 'refund_failure' 'reserve_transaction' 'reserved_funds' 'stripe_fee' 'stripe_fx_fee' 'tax_fee' 'topup' 'topup_reversal' 'transfer' 'transfer_cancel' 'transfer_failure' 'transfer_refund')}}",
    "source": "{{faker 'random.alpha' count = 3}}_{{faker 'random.alphaNumeric' 25}}",
    "status": "{{oneOf (array 'available' 'pending')}}",
    "type": "{{oneOf (array 'adjustement' 'advance' 'advance_funding' 'anticipation_repayment' 'application_fee' 'application_fee_refund' 'charge' 'connect_collection_transfer' 'contribution' 'issuing_authorization_hold' 'issuing_authorization_release' 'issuing_dispute' 'issuing_transaction' 'payment_failure_refund' 'payment' 'payment_refund' 'payout' 'payout_cancel' 'payout_failure' 'refund' 'refund_failure' 'reserve_transaction' 'reserved_funds' 'stripe_fee' 'stripe_fx_fee' 'tax_fee' 'topup' 'topup_reversal' 'transfer' 'transfer_cancel' 'transfer_failure' 'transfer_refund')}}"
  }{{/repeat}}
}

routes.documentation: Retrieve the details of the Stripe transaction corresponding the transaction ID provided

responses.body:
{
  "id": "{{urlParam 'id'}}",
  "object": "balance_transaction",
  "amount": {{faker 'random.number' min = -999999 max = 999999}},
  "available_on": {{faker 'random.number' max = 2147483647}},
  "created": {{faker 'random.number' max = 2147483647}},
  "currency": "{{oneOf (array 'nzd' 'czk' 'aud' 'usd' 'eur' 'cad' 'gbp' 'jpy' 'brl' 'sek')}}",

  "exchange_rate": null,

  "source": "{{faker 'random.alpha' count = 3}}_{{faker 'random.alphaNumeric' 25}}",
  "status": "{{oneOf (array 'available' 'pending')}}",
  "type": "{{oneOf (array 'adjustement' 'advance' 'advance_funding' 'anticipation_repayment' 'application_fee' 'application_fee_refund' 'charge' 'connect_collection_transfer' 'contribution' 'issuing_authorization_hold' 'issuing_authorization_release' 'issuing_dispute' 'issuing_transaction' 'payment_failure_refund' 'payment' 'payment_refund' 'payout' 'payout_cancel' 'payout_failure' 'refund' 'refund_failure' 'reserve_transaction' 'reserved_funds' 'stripe_fee' 'stripe_fx_fee' 'tax_fee' 'topup' 'topup_reversal' 'transfer' 'transfer_cancel' 'transfer_failure' 'transfer_refund')}}"
}

  "status": "{{oneOf (array 'succeeded' 'pending' 'failed')}}",
  "transfer_data": null,
  "transfer_group": null,
  "source": "{{faker 'random.alpha' count = 3}}_{{faker 'random.alphaNumeric' 25}}"
}

routes.documentation: Retrieve a list of ten charges.

responses.body:
{
  "object": "list",
  "url": "/v1/charges",
  "has_more": false,
  "data": [
    {{#repeat 10}}
    
    {
      "id": "{{faker 'random.alpha' count = 3}}_{{faker 'random.alphaNumeric' 25}}",
      "object": "charge",
      "amount": {{faker 'random.number' max = 99999999}},
      "amount_captured": {{faker 'random.number' max = 99999999}},
      "amount_refunded": {{faker 'random.number' max = 99999999}},
      "application": null,
      "application_fee": null,
      "application_fee_amount": null,
      "balance_transaction": "{{faker 'random.alpha' count = 3}}_{{faker 'random.alphaNumeric' 25}}",
      "billing_details": {
        "address": {
          "city": "{{faker 'address.city'}}",
          "country": "{{faker 'address.countryCode'}}",
          "line1": null,
          "line2": null,
          "postal_code": "{{faker 'address.zipCode'}}",
          "state": "{{faker 'address.county'}}"
        },
        "email": "{{faker 'internet.email'}}",
        "name": "{{faker 'name.firstName'}} {{faker 'name.lastName'}}",
        "phone": "{{faker 'phone.phoneNumber'}}"
      },
      "calculated_statement_descriptor": null,
      "captured": {{oneOf (array true false)}},
      "created": {{faker 'random.number' max = 2147483647}},,
      "currency": "{{oneOf (array 'nzd' 'czk' 'aud' 'usd' 'eur' 'cad' 'gbp' 'jpy' 'brl' 'sek')}}",
      "customer": "{{faker 'random.alpha' count = 3}}_{{faker 'random.alphaNumeric' 25}}",
      "description": "My Test Charge using Mockoon",
      "disputed": {{oneOf (array true false)}},
      "failure_code": null,
      "failure_message": null,
      "fraud_details": {},
      "invoice": "{{faker 'random.alpha' count = 3}}_{{faker 'random.alphaNumeric' 25}}",
      "livemode": {{oneOf (array true false)}},
      "metadata": {},
      "on_behalf_of": null,
      "order": null,
      "outcome": null,
      "paid": {{oneOf (array true false)}},
      "payment_intent": "{{faker 'random.alpha' count = 3}}_{{faker 'random.alphaNumeric' 25}}",
      "payment_method": "card_{{faker 'random.alphaNumeric' 25}}",
      "payment_method_details": {
        "card": {
          "brand": "{{oneOf (array 'amex' 'diners' 'discover' 'jcb' 'mastercard' 'unionpay' 'visa' 'unknown')}}",
          "checks": {
            "address_line1_check": "{{oneOf (array 'checked' 'unchecked')}}",
            "address_postal_code_check": "{{oneOf (array 'checked' 'unchecked')}}",
            "cvc_check": "{{oneOf (array 'checked' 'unchecked')}}"
          },
          "country": "{{faker 'address.countryCode'}}",
          "exp_month": {{faker 'random.number' max = 12}},
          "exp_year": {{faker 'random.number' min = 2000 max = 2021}},
          "fingerprint": "Xt5EWLLDS7FJjR1c",
          "funding": "credit",
          "installments": null,
          "last4": "{{faker 'random.number' max = 9999}}",
          "network": "{{oneOf (array 'cartes_bancaires' 'amex' 'diners' 'discover' 'jcb' 'mastercard' 'unionpay' 'visa' 'unknown')}}",
          "three_d_secure": null,
          "wallet": null
        },
        "type": "{{oneOf (array 'ach_credit_transfer' 'ach_debit' 'alipay' 'au_becs_debit' 'bancontact' 'card' 'card_present' 'eps' 'giropay' 'ideal' 'klarna' 'multibanco' 'p24' 'sepa_debit' 'sofort' 'stripe_account' 'wechat')}}"
      },
      "receipt_email": "{{faker 'internet.email'}}",
      "receipt_number": {{faker 'random.number'}},
      "receipt_url": "https://pay.stripe.com/receipts/acct_{{faker 'random.alphaNumeric' 25}}/ch_{{faker 'random.alphaNumeric' 25}}/rcpt_{{faker 'random.alphaNumeric' 25}}",
      "refunded": {{oneOf (array true false)}},
      "refunds": {
        "object": "list",
        "data": [],
        "has_more": {{oneOf (array true false)}},
        "url": "/v1/charges/ch_{{faker 'random.alphaNumeric' 25}}/refunds"
      },
      "review": "{{faker 'random.alpha' count = 3}}_{{faker 'random.alphaNumeric' 25}}",
      "shipping": null,
      "source_transfer": null,
      "statement_descriptor": null,
      "statement_descriptor_suffix": null,
      "status": "{{oneOf (array 'succeeded' 'pending' 'failed')}}",
      "transfer_data": null,
      "transfer_group": null
    }{{/repeat}}
  ]
}
